# Shared Harness Instructions

<!-- Generated by scripts/agent-harnesses.py; do not edit directly. -->

Always load repository instructions first, then use shared skills from
`~/.agents/skills` when a task matches a skill description. Prefer the canonical
command prompts under `~/.agents/harness/commands` and specialist agent
definitions under `~/.agents/harness/agents`.

Safety-sensitive lifecycle events must be normalized through
`~/.agents/harness/hooks/contract.json` and evaluated by the shared safety policy.
Adapters may add stricter native permissions, but they must not weaken a shared
deny decision.

## Answer Beacon

When directly answering a user question, especially inside a longer status update
or mixed task output, prefix the answer with:

💬 Answer:

Use this marker only for actual answers to user questions, not every progress
update.
